summary: Testing of new card features complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified - Global Search, Card Duplicate, Checklist Delete, Attachment Delete/Set Cover buttons. CORS fix verified.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed
Console warning: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' - accessibility improvement needed
WebSocket connection intermittently fails and reconnects - not blocking functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Login API returns session_token correctly
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: CORS preflight request successful (CORS fix verified)
Backend: Global Search returns boards, cards, templates structure
Backend: Global Search finds specific cards by title
Backend: Global Search handles empty query
Backend: Card Duplicate creates copy with '(copy)' suffix
Backend: Card Duplicate returns 404 for non-existent card
Backend: Delete Checklist Item removes item successfully
Backend: Delete Checklist Item returns 404 for non-existent item
Backend: Set Card Cover updates cover_image field
Backend: Set Card Cover returns 404 for non-existent card
Backend: Delete Attachment returns 404 for non-existent attachment
Frontend: Global Search component visible in dashboard header
Frontend: Global Search dropdown shows results for 'test' query
Frontend: Global Search shows Boards and Cards sections
Frontend: Global Search clear button works
Frontend: Card Detail Modal has Duplicate Card button in sidebar
Frontend: Duplicate Card button creates copy (toast 'Card duplicated' shown)
Frontend: Duplicated card appears in list with '(copy)' suffix
Frontend: Checklist section visible with Add item input
Frontend: Checklist delete (X) button visible on hover
Frontend: Attachments section visible with Add Attachment button
Frontend: Save Changes button visible in sidebar
Frontend: Delete Card button visible in sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: CORS middleware properly configured with allow_origins=['*'] and allow_credentials=False - frontend uses Bearer tokens
Global search correctly filters user's accessible boards and cards only
Card duplicate preserves title, description, labels, priority, checklist items (uncompleted)
Duplicate card does NOT copy attachments, comments, cover_image, or assigned members by design
Delete checklist item endpoint broadcasts WebSocket event for real-time sync
Set cover and delete attachment endpoints properly check workspace access permissions
seed_data_creation: TEST_CardForDuplicateTest card created and cleaned up. 'Overdue Task (copy)' created during duplicate test remains.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New card features fully tested: Global Search (GET /api/search), Card Duplicate (POST /api/cards/{id}/duplicate), Delete Checklist Item (DELETE /api/cards/{id}/checklist/{item_id}), Set Card Cover (PATCH /api/cards/{id}/cover), Delete Attachment (DELETE /api/cards/{id}/attachments/{file_id}). Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_new_card_features.py. All CRUD operations verified. CORS fix confirmed working - frontend uses Bearer tokens in localStorage, not cookies.

login_cors_fix.details: Login API works correctly with CORS. Standard CORSMiddleware with allow_origins=['*'], allow_credentials=False. Frontend uses Bearer tokens from localStorage.

global_search.details: GET /api/search?q=term returns {boards:[], cards:[], templates:[]} for user's accessible data. Frontend GlobalSearch component in DashboardPage header with debounced search and keyboard shortcut (Ctrl+K).

card_duplicate.details: POST /api/cards/{id}/duplicate creates copy in same list with '(copy)' suffix. Copies title, description, labels, priority, checklist (uncompleted). Does NOT copy attachments, comments, cover_image, assigned_members.

delete_checklist_item.details: DELETE /api/cards/{id}/checklist/{item_id} removes item. Frontend shows X button on hover over checklist items.

set_card_cover.details: PATCH /api/cards/{id}/cover sets cover_image field. Frontend attachment preview shows 'Set as Cover' button (ImageIcon) for image attachments.

delete_attachment.details: DELETE /api/cards/{id}/attachments/{file_id} removes attachment. Also clears cover_image if attachment was used as cover. Frontend shows delete button (Trash2) on hover.

card_cover_display.details: BoardPage card preview shows cover image at top if cover_image is set (lines 1173-1183). Uses API_BASE prefix for relative URLs.
